introSection: Roaring Timbers is a wooden roller coaster manufactured by Great Coasters International and designed by Skyline Attractions located at Sun World Hon Thom Nature Park in Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang, Vietnam. It opened on 1 February 2022.
fullText: Roaring Timbers is a wooden roller coaster manufactured by Great Coasters International and designed by Skyline Attractions located at Sun World Hon Thom Nature Park in Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang, Vietnam. It opened on 1 February 2022.
